description: Add unit tests for the telemetry services and key components, add lint configuration, and ensure the full project passes build, lint, and test verification.
steps: Create vitest.config.ts (or add vitest config in vite.config.ts) with jsdom environment, setup files for @testing-library/jest-dom, and coverage configuration.

Create src/services/__tests__/dummyTelemetry.test.ts - Test that the dummy provider: emits data through the callback, generates data matching the DMSTelemetry interface shape, produces values within expected ranges (scores 0-100, confidence 0-1, angles -90 to 90), can be connected and disconnected cleanly.
Create src/components/__tests__/Dashboard.test.tsx - Test that Dashboard renders without crashing, displays the title, shows connection status.
Create src/components/__tests__/DriverStatePanel.test.tsx - Test that it renders the correct state text and applies appropriate color classes for each driver state.
Create .eslintrc.cjs with TypeScript and React hooks rules configured.
Add lint script to package.json: eslint src --ext .ts,.tsx
Run full verification: npm run build && npm test -- --run && npm run lint
acceptance_criteria: Running `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm test -- --run` passes all tests
Running `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm run build` succeeds
Running `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm run lint` passes with no errors (warnings acceptable)
Test coverage exists for telemetry service and at least 2 UI components
verification: unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/ind-vias-dms-cockpit && npm run build
unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/ind-vias-dms-cockpit && npm run lint
